plan.reasoning: We play Wrought in War to summon the Sovereign Blade and deal 7 damage to the dangerous Calcified Cultist. The Sovereign Blade will spawn with 17 damage, which is exactly enough to finish off the Calcified Cultist (23 HP - 7 = 16 HP). Then, we play Defend to fully block the 1 incoming damage from the Damp Cultist, and play Solar Strike on the Damp Cultist to deal 9 damage and gain 1 Star. This results in 0 damage taken and eliminates the main threat.
